title: Medium Paragraph
description: A longer block of prose. Train endurance and recovery from small mistakes.

drills.content: The library smelled of paper and old wood. Light slanted through tall windows and fell across long tables where students leaned over books, pencils tapping, pages turning at irregular intervals. A clock ticked above the front desk. Outside, leaves rattled along the path, and a delivery truck idled at the curb. None of it broke the quiet inside, which had its own weight and its own slow, careful rhythm.
